creator: connect@quicknq.anonaddy.me
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #1)
Thanks! I've updated the port accordingly.

Just one more question,
> Checksum of the distfile should also be updated in the distinfo file.

I've added distinfo file (as an attachment). But should I add it manually (each time) or ports build infrastructure generates it automatically? Sorry, but I got little bit confused here.
